title: 目標達成の後に・毎日ボーノ配信☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Every day is buono! Big and delicious is the
best. ♪ I'm Hishi Akebono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Today I have a special guest with me! Everyone,
please meet my trainer, who's here to help me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We train together every single day, and I couldn't
ask for a more wonderful trainer!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
You have a trainer, Bono?!
Hello, Trainer!
What's this about a trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Comments pour in, and the screen fills with
dancing carrot stickers as viewers send them in as
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You all sent so many requests for this, so today
I'd like to introduce some big, buono dishes
that'll liven up any holiday party! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to tell this isn't her first time holding an
Umastalive. But to retrace how we got here, we
have to go back to a few hours ago.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Could you help me with my Umastalive, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Umastagram has a live streaming feature, you
see, and anyone can use it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I like to host little cooking shows on there every
now and then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I usually do everything by myself, but I'm going to
be making a lot of food this time and wanted to
have someone on as a taste tester.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I also want to introduce you to everyone as my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! I want my fans to know that I'm working
hard, not only on my cooking, but in my races
with you too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That way, maybe more people will come to watch
me run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, what she said at the racecourse the
other day pops into my head.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to make even more people smile! I want to
make it so the audience feels as warm as if they
just finished playing tag!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
...And make it so the stands fill up with more and
more people!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, I'm gonna whip up lots of
food! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono wants to fill up the stands by first
filling up the audience's appetites and stomachs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And for that, she plans to do a usual cooking
stream and use it to advertise her racing career at
the same time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ Today's menu includes roast chicken
with a creamy stew and garden salad!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
First, we have to rub salt into the chicken! You'll
need one gram of salt for every hundred grams of
chicken.

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: What does rubbing salt on it do?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It helps remove the poultry smell and keeps the
meat nice and juicy.

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
I made your curry with my mom the other day! It
was very buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? Yay! Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad today's dishes are so easy to
understand!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. That's good to hear. If there's anything
you don't get, don't be afraid to ask me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her hands never stop moving as she dutifully
responds to all the comments. She seems to have
built a great rapport with her audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've glimpsed a new side of Hishi
Akebono today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She carries on preparing dish after dish, and they
start coming together without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the chicken is ready. Okay, time for the final
touches.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
To finish things off, let's sprinkle some parsley
over the cream stew! It tastes fine without, so it's
fine if you don't add any.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You can wrap the chicken in foil if you're worried,
but it's no problem if you don't!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Next, pour the homemade dressing on the
salad! ♪ Of course, it's buono even without it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And we're done! ☆ All right, Trainer, go ahead
and try some!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
That looks sooo good!
Switch places with me!
You're so lucky, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the comments flying across the screen make
my head spin.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Sorry, this must be nerve-racking, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here, we can eat together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. Let's just eat like always. Down the
hatch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Hishi Akebono sitting across from me and
digging into her food makes me feel a bit better,
so I taste a spoonful of the stew myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My breath is immediately stolen away by the rich
umami deliciousness that fills my senses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second I taste the stew, I find myself craving
the salty-sweet chicken. Once I finish that, I
instinctively reach out for the fresh salad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a moment where I finally come to my
senses, and my eyes meet with Hishi Akebono's.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Is it buono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You were eating so enthusiastically!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it! These holiday dishes were
so buono that Trainer couldn't resist devouring
everything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for watching, everybody! I hope you'll try
making these yourself!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
That food was gone in a flash!
The tastiness of the dishes came across loud and
clear.
I'll give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: You two make a great pair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stream comes to a close with another wave of
warm, supportive comments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I discover that my foodie segment
has gone viral, though I have no idea why.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Look at this! My follower count went way,
way up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this blurb. "I can't believe it only took
one bite for your trainer to get hooked! Food has
never looked better than in that stream."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks a bunch, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she usually gains more fans after getting
good results on the racecourse, this viral clip has
attracted droves of new followers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm thrilled by the thought that this newfound
fame might help bring more attention to Hishi
Akebono during her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are looking good! We have to keep up the
momentum and keep raking in more fans!
